name: Anhui Genuine New Materials Co.,Ltd.
summary: Anhui Genuine New Materials Co.,Ltd. researches and develops, manufactures, and deals in printing and packaging materials in China and internationally. It offers cigarette sealing and cigarette tipping paper products; printed aluminum castling papers; and thermal transfer foils for use in cigarette tipping papers, gifts, and other decoration packages, as well as thermal transfer films. The company was formerly known as Taihu Jiyou Paper Industry Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Anhui Genuine New Materials Co.,Ltd. in March 2016. Anhui Genuine New Materials Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is based in Hefei, China.
